task_completion.description: Verify the Business Partner is created with the correct Name and Search Key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Riverside Landscaping Co.' in the Name field and 'RIVERSIDE01' in the Search Key field within the iDempiere Business Partner window.

task_completion.description: Verify the Business Partner is set as an active Customer with a Credit Limit of 50000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checked 'Customer' checkbox and '50000' in the Credit Limit field (typically found in the Customer tab).

task_completion.description: Verify the billing address is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '742 Garden Vista Drive', 'Portland', 'OR' (Oregon), '97201', and 'USA' in the Location/Address tab or dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the contact person is added with the correct name and title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Michael Chen' in the Name field and 'Owner' in the Title field under the Contacts/Users tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the contact person's phone number and email are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '503-555-7892' in the Phone field and 'mchen@riverside-landscaping.com' in the Email field under the Contacts/Users tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the business partner.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface or desktop client being used, rather than a terminal executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required data must be visible inside the proper input fields of the iDempiere application, not just typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The Business Partner record and its associated tabs were actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Saved' confirmation message in the status bar, the record appearing in a grid/list view, or the save icon indicating the record is successfully stored.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Expected Search Key is 'RIVERSIDE01'. Expected Name is 'Riverside Landscaping Co.'. Expected City is 'Portland'. Expected Contact Name is 'Michael Chen'. Additional details required by task: Credit Limit: 50000, Address: 742 Garden Vista Drive, OR 97201, USA. Contact Title: Owner, Phone: 503-555-7892, Email: mchen@riverside-landscaping.com.
